title: FIND A CRIB - 211info
text: CRIBS FOR KIDS FIND A CRIB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides cribs. Crib limits are 30 pounds and 35 inches. Eligibility: Families with infants ages 0-12 months Hours: Not applicable Email (888) 721-2742 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 721-2742 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Furniture * Infants/Toddlers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
